title: Sinus Headache in the Office? Try These 8 Herbal Creams
description: Thymus vulgaris creams, also known as thyme cream, contain thymol, a compound found in the leaves of the thyme plant. Thymol has natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe sinus headaches. The menthol in thyme cream can also ease congestion by thinning mucus and making it easier to breathe. The eucalyptus oil in thyme cream can help reduce inflammation and ease sinus pressure.
